title: Decouple auth command availability from platform configuration
body:
## Background

From PR #268 code review finding.

## Problem

The auth command group is only registered when `TokenStore` is non-nil, which requires platform mode to be enabled and `serviceUrl` to be configured. This prevents useful subcommands like `status` and `logout` from working when:
- User has an existing token file but `serviceUrl` is not configured
- Platform mode is partially configured

## Proposed Solution

1. Always register the auth command group when `TokenStore` can be initialized (even if `Client` is nil)
2. Have each subcommand check its specific dependencies and show helpful configuration errors
3. `logout` and `status` should work with just `TokenStore`
4. `login` should show clear error if `Client` (serviceUrl) is missing

## Impact

Improves UX for users in edge cases where auth configuration is partial.

## References

- PR #268
- Finding fingerprint: `be9322404f9b15213281204274be283c`
